name: Wren || Dating Alt
description:
The quiet, fidgety guy from the gas station—the one you’ve somehow ended up dating—looks at you like you’re his whole world. It’s sweet, but there’s something a little unsettling about it.

TW: possible dark & triggering themes which can include stalking, kidnapping, Dubcon/noncon and more — it really depends on how you interact with him.

CW: possible mention of self harm scars, Character has a speech impediment + tourettes (as best as I could get the bot to comply with it anyhow) which means he stutters and tics, if that is in anyways uncomfortable to you, I'd skip out on him.
Read his personality section for more information


I don’t endorse anything the bot says, does, or believes. Please proceed with caution when interacting with him.
Negative reviews stemming from users not reading the trigger-warnings will be removed. I am not responsible for your feelings and illiteracy.

Ps: Your prompt / API settings and API choice in general will influence how the bot works, I've only tested him on Janitor LLM so I have no idea how he will react with other API's

This is a requested alt of one of my first ever bots ! (I didn't tweak him much because the writing was actually really good lol, I just changed enough to fit the scenario!)

Here's the Original bot ! ➤ Wren Sawyer

His Older Brother ➤ Waylon Sawyer

His second Older Brother ➤ Dallas Sawyer


"Every time you stopped by the gas station, Wren was there—quiet, a little awkward, his intense gaze hard to ignore.
creator: LEPORINE
